title: T-016 — Sanitation checklist Server Action + ATP gate + allergen dual e-sign (V-MNT-15..17, D-MNT-14)
prompt:
# T-016 — Sanitation completion with dual sign-off

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §11.4 (V-MNT-15..17), §7.2 D-MNT-14 (allergen cross-module event), §9.14, §14.3, §14.5 (BRCGS dual sign-off)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `completeSanitation` Server Action that records `sanitation_checklists` row. If `allergen_change_flag=true`, V-MNT-15..17 enforce dual e-sign + ATP test threshold + cross-module outbox event `sanitation.allergen_change.completed` to 08-production `allergen_changeover_gate_v1`.

## Pre-flight
Verify T-006 (sanitation_checklists), T-001 (perms — need new `mnt.sanit.complete` or reuse `mnt.mwo.sign`; reuse mnt.mwo.sign per §4 RBAC matrix; do NOT add new perm). Verify Wave1 T-124 e-sign primitive. Verify `maintenance_alert_thresholds.atp_rlu_threshold` from T-013.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/sanitation.ts`:
   - `completeSanitation({mwoId, lineId, cipProgram, tempC, concentrationPct, durationMin, flowRateLPerMin, allergenChangeFlag, allergensRemoved[], atpTestResultRlu, firstSignedBy, firstSignerPin, secondSignedBy?, secondSignerPin?, completedAt})`:
     - If `allergenChangeFlag=true`:
       - V-MNT-15: firstSignedBy AND secondSignedBy AND atpTestResultRlu MUST be NOT NULL → else `SANITATION_DUAL_SIGNOFF_REQUIRED`.
       - V-MNT-17: firstSignedBy != secondSignedBy → else `SANITATION_SAME_SIGNER`.
       - V-MNT-16: atpTestResultRlu < `maintenance_alert_thresholds.atp_rlu_threshold` (default 30) → else `SANITATION_ATP_FAIL`.
       - Verify both PINs via Wave1 T-124 e-sign primitive.
       - Emit outbox event `sanitation.allergen_change.completed` consumed by 08-production `allergen_changeover_gate_v1` (D-MNT-14).
     - Else (allergen_change_flag=false): emit outbox `sanitation.completed` only.
     - Insert sanitation_checklists row inside transaction; retention_until auto-set by GENERATED column (T-006).
2. Zod schema requires both signers + ATP when allergenChangeFlag=true.
3. Vitest with Testcontainers + mocked e-sign covering: V-MNT-15 missing dual sign-off blocked; V-MNT-17 same-signer blocked; V-MNT-16 atp>=threshold blocked; non-allergen path emits only `sanitation.completed`; allergen path emits `sanitation.allergen_change.completed`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/sanitation.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/sanitation.schema.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/sanitation.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given completeSanitation with allergenChangeFlag=true and secondSignedBy=NULL, when called, then fails `SANITATION_DUAL_SIGNOFF_REQUIRED` (V-MNT-15).
2. Given completeSanitation with firstSignedBy === secondSignedBy, when called, then fails `SANITATION_SAME_SIGNER` (V-MNT-17).
3. Given atpTestResultRlu=45 and threshold=30, when called, then fails `SANITATION_ATP_FAIL` (V-MNT-16).
4. Given allergenChangeFlag=true and all guards pass, when called, then sanitation_checklists row is inserted AND outbox row event_type='sanitation.allergen_change.completed' is written with payload {mwo_id, line_id, allergens_removed, atp_test_result_rlu}.
5. Given allergenChangeFlag=false, when called, then sanitation_checklists row is inserted AND outbox row event_type='sanitation.completed' is written (no allergen variant).

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest asserting all five ACs with Testcontainers + mocked e-sign.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/sanitation.test.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip ATP threshold load from `maintenance_alert_thresholds` — config-driven per L2 §13.2.
- Do not bypass Wave1 T-124 e-sign for PIN verification.
- Do not emit `sanitation.allergen_change.completed` for non-allergen path — D-MNT-14 cross-module routing requires specificity.
- Do not allow same-signer sign-off (V-MNT-17 critical BRCGS).
- Do not store ATP RLU as text — INT only.

pipeline_inputs.description: completeSanitation with V-MNT-15..17 dual e-sign + ATP threshold + cross-module sanitation.allergen_change.completed event to 08-production allergen_changeover_gate_v1.

Given allergenChangeFlag=false, when called, then row inserted AND outbox sanitation.completed written (no allergen variant)
